info.name: FIT4110 Lab03 - Access Gate Core Contract Tests
info.description: Pair 10 contract tests: Access Gate consumer with Core Business provider, plus Analytics consumer-side smoke.

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Health response identifies Core Business', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql('ok'); pm.expect(json.service).to.eql('core-business'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('time'); });
pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Decision response matches contract', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('decisionId'); pm.expect(['ALLOW', 'DENY']).to.include(json.decision); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('policyId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('checkedAt'); });
pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Policy page uses cursor contract', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.items).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('nextCursor'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('hasMore'); });

item.name: GET /policies/access/{policyId} - policy detail has discriminator rules

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Policy detail contains typed rules', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('policyId'); pm.expect(json.rules).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; pm.expect(json.rules[0]).to.have.property('ruleType'); });
pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Decision page can be consumed for audit', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.items).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('nextCursor'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('hasMore'); });
pm.test('Unauthorized request returns 401 or 403', function () { pm.expect([401, 403]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Auth error follows Problem Details when a body is returned', function () { if (pm.response.text()) { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.status).to.be.within(400, 599); } });

item.name: POST /access/check - invalid token behavior is explicit

exec: const isMock = pm.environment.get('env') === 'mock';

pm.test('Invalid token behavior is checked without forcing Prism auth response', function () { if (isMock) { pm.expect([200, 401, 403]).to.include(pm.response.code); } else { pm.expect([401, 403]).to.include(pm.response.code); } });
pm.test('No Prefer header forces auth response', function () { pm.expect(pm.request.headers.has('Prefer')).to.eql(false); });
pm.test('Invalid payload returns a client error', function () { pm.expect([400, 422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Validation error has Problem Details shape', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('status'); pm.expect(json.status).to.be.within(400, 599); });
pm.test('Enum violation returns a client error', function () { pm.expect([400, 422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Error response is parseable by Access Gate', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('title'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('status'); });
pm.test('Limit above maximum returns a client error', function () { pm.expect([400, 422]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Unknown policy returns 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('Not found response is a problem object when present', function () { if (pm.response.text()) { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql(404); } });

pm.test('Boundary limit=1 returns a valid page', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.items).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json.items.length).to.be.at.most(1); });
pm.test('Nullable idempotencyKey is accepted by contract', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Response still includes decision fields', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(['ALLOW', 'DENY']).to.include(json.decision); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('decisionId'); });

item.name: POST Analytics /analytics/access-events - Gate sends hashed access event

exec: pm.test('Analytics mock accepts access event', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(202); });
pm.test('Gate can parse Analytics acknowledgement', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('eventId'); pm.expect(json.accepted).to.eql(true); });

pm.test('Consumer sends privacy-safe cardIdHash only', function () { const body = JSON.parse(pm.request.body.raw); pm.expect(body).to.have.property('cardIdHash'); pm.expect(body).to.not.have.property('cardId'); });
const isLocal = pm.environment.get('env') === 'local';

pm.test('SLA assertion runs only against local Core service', function () { if (isLocal) { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(500); } else { pm.expect(pm.environment.get('env')).to.eql('mock'); } });
pm.test('Access check remains contract-compatible', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
